title: Method, terminal device and computer-readable storage medium for wireless connection
abstract: Provided are a method, terminal device and computer-readable storage medium for wireless connection. The method includes that: a first trajectory input by a user is obtained (110); whether a second trajectory for a second terminal device is matched with the first trajectory is determined (120); and a wireless connection between the first terminal device and the second terminal device is established (130), in response to the determination that the second trajectory is matched with the first trajectory.
claims: Claims ( 15 ) AĂ‚Â methodĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â wirelessĂ‚Â connection,Ă‚Â comprising: obtainingĂ‚Â (110)Ă‚Â aĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â trajectoryĂ‚Â forĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â terminalĂ‚Â device,Ă‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â terminalĂ‚Â deviceĂ‚Â beingĂ‚Â inĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â screen-offĂ‚Â state,Ă‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â trajectoryĂ‚Â indicatingĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â trajectoryĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â gesture; determiningĂ‚Â (120)Ă‚Â whetherĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â trajectoryĂ‚Â forĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â terminalĂ‚Â deviceĂ‚Â isĂ‚Â matchedĂ‚Â withĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â trajectory,Ă‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â trajectoryĂ‚Â indicatingĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â trajectoryĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â gesture;Ă‚Â and establishingĂ‚Â (130)Ă‚Â aĂ‚Â wirelessĂ‚Â connectionĂ‚Â betweenĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â terminalĂ‚Â deviceĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â terminalĂ‚Â device,Ă‚Â inĂ‚Â responseĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â determinationĂ‚Â thatĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â trajectoryĂ‚Â isĂ‚Â matchedĂ‚Â withĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â trajectory.
